title: Senior Data Scientist
description: We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to join our analytics team. You will build ML models to detect fraud, improve member experience, and drive business decisions. You will work with cross-functional teams and mentor junior data scientists.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in data science or ML engineering. Proficiency in Python and SQL. Experience with scikit-learn, XGBoost, or similar ML frameworks. Familiarity with AWS or GCP. Strong communication skills.
